title: Work and Life Balance
description: A text about managing work responsibilities and maintaining a healthy personal life.
text: Many people today struggle to find a balance between work and personal life.
Nour works as a graphic designer, and she loves her job, but sometimes it takes too much of her time.
She often stays late at work to finish projects and meet deadlines.
At first, Nour felt proud of being productive, but after some time, she noticed that she was always tired and had less time for her family and friends.
She stopped exercising and felt stressed most of the time.
One day, Nour decided to change her routine.
She started planning her work better and setting clear limits.
She left work on time and used her evenings to relax or spend time with people she loves.
Although she still works hard, she now feels healthier and happier.
Nour learned that success is not only about working more hours, but also about taking care of yourself.

questions.question: What problem did Nour face?
options: She did not like her job
She had too much free time
She struggled to balance work and personal life
She wanted to change her career
questions.correctAnswer: She struggled to balance work and personal life

questions.question: How did Nour feel after working long hours?
What change did Nour make?
options: She planned her work better and set limits
questions.correctAnswer: She planned her work better and set limits

questions.question: What lesson did Nour learn?
options: Success means working all the time
Taking care of yourself is important
Family is less important than work
questions.correctAnswer: Taking care of yourself is important
